script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, can I order a coffee?
script.translation_zh: 嗨，丽莎，我可以点咖啡吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, Alex. What size do you want?
script.translation_zh: 当然，亚历克斯。你要什么大小的？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I want a medium coffee, please.
script.translation_zh: 我想要一个中杯咖啡，谢谢。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: OK. Do you want milk or sugar?
script.translation_zh: 好的。你要牛奶或糖吗？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Just milk, please. Thanks, Lisa.
script.translation_zh: 只要牛奶，谢谢，丽莎。

vocabulary.example: Can I order a coffee, please?
vocabulary.example_zh: 请问我可以点一杯咖啡吗？

vocabulary.example: I want a medium coffee, please.
Do you want milk or sugar?

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, can you help me?
script.translation_zh: 嗨，丽莎，你能帮我吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, what do you need, Alex?
script.translation_zh: 好的，你需要什么，亚历克斯？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I need directions to the train station.
script.translation_zh: 我需要去火车站的路线。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: OK, go straight and turn right at the corner.
script.translation_zh: 好的，直走然后在拐角处右转。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Thanks, Lisa. I hope I find it easily.
script.translation_zh: 谢谢，丽莎。我希望能轻松找到。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: You will, Alex. Have a great day!
script.translation_zh: 你会的，亚历克斯。祝你今天愉快！

vocabulary.example: Can you help me with this?
She gave me directions to her house.
vocabulary.example_zh: 她给了我去她家的路线。

vocabulary.example: I took the train to work.
The bus station is nearby.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa! I am at the market.
script.translation_zh: 嗨丽莎！我在市场上。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Great! Are you buying fruit today?
script.translation_zh: 太好了！你今天买水果吗？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yes, I need some apples and oranges.
script.translation_zh: 是的，我需要一些苹果和橙子。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: OK, apples are very fresh now.
script.translation_zh: 好的，现在苹果非常新鲜。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Thanks! I will get a few kilos.
script.translation_zh: 谢谢！我会买几公斤。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, enjoy your shopping, Alex!
script.translation_zh: 当然，亚历克斯，购物愉快！

vocabulary.example: We buy food at the market.
She likes eating fresh fruit.
I eat an apple every day.
Oranges are full of vitamin C.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, do you want to meet tomorrow?
script.translation_zh: 嗨，莉萨，你想明天见面吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, what time is good for you?
script.translation_zh: 好啊，几点合适？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Around 3 PM works for me.
script.translation_zh: 下午三点左右对我来说合适。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Great, let's meet at the park.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我们在公园见面。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: OK, see you then!
script.translation_zh: 好的，到时见！

vocabulary.example: We will meet at the park.
Tomorrow is a good day to meet.
Let's meet at the park.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hello! I have a room reservation.
script.translation_zh: 你好！我有一个房间预订。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Welcome! What is your name, please?
script.translation_zh: 欢迎！请问您的名字是什么？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: My name is Alex Brown.
script.translation_zh: 我的名字是亚历克斯·布朗。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: OK, I found your booking. Here is your key.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我找到了您的预订。这是您的钥匙。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Thank you! What time is breakfast?
script.translation_zh: 谢谢！请问早餐时间是几点？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Breakfast is from 7 to 10 AM.
script.translation_zh: 早餐时间是早上七点到十点。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Great, thanks! Have a nice day!
script.translation_zh: 太好了，谢谢！祝您今天愉快！

vocabulary.example: I have a reservation at the hotel.
Breakfast is served from 7 AM.
vocabulary.example_zh: 早餐从早上七点开始供应。

vocabulary.example: Your booking is confirmed.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa! Can we order food now?
script.translation_zh: 嗨，丽莎！我们可以现在点餐吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, Alex. What do you want to eat?
script.translation_zh: 好的，亚历克斯。你想吃什么？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I want a pizza. Is it good here?
script.translation_zh: 我想要一个披萨。这里的好吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Yes, the pizza is very good here.
script.translation_zh: 是的，这里的披萨很好。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Great! Let's order two pizzas, please.
script.translation_zh: 太好了！请点两个披萨。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: OK, I will tell the waiter now.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我现在告诉服务员。

vocabulary.example: I want to order some food.
She ordered a large pizza.
The waiter brings our food.
vocabulary.example_zh: 服务员把我们的食物端上来了。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, how is the weather today?
script.translation_zh: 嗨 Lisa，今天的天气怎么样？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: It is sunny and warm outside.
script.translation_zh: 外面阳光明媚，天气温暖。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Great! I love sunny days.
script.translation_zh: 太好了！我喜欢阳光明媚的日子。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Tomorrow may be cloudy and cool.
script.translation_zh: 明天可能会多云和凉爽。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: OK, I will take a jacket.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我会带一件夹克。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sounds like a good idea.
script.translation_zh: 听起来是个好主意。

vocabulary.example: It is sunny and warm outside.
vocabulary.example_zh: 外面阳光明媚，天气温暖。

vocabulary.example: The weather is sunny and warm.
vocabulary.example_zh: 天气阳光明媚，温暖宜人。

vocabulary.example: Tomorrow may be cloudy and cool.
vocabulary.example_zh: 明天可能会多云，天气凉爽。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi, I am Alex. I live next door.
script.translation_zh: 嗨，我是Alex。我住隔壁。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Hello Alex! Nice to meet you.
script.translation_zh: 你好Alex！很高兴认识你。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Do you need any help with moving?
script.translation_zh: 你需要帮忙搬东西吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Thanks! I would love some help.
script.translation_zh: 谢谢！我很需要一些帮助。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: OK, I will come over soon.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我马上过来。

vocabulary.example: My neighbor is very friendly.
Please close the door when you leave.
Can you help me with my homework?

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, can you help me buy a train ticket?
script.translation_zh: 嗨 Lisa，你能帮我买火车票吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, Alex. Where do you want to go?
script.translation_zh: 当然可以，Alex。你想去哪儿？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I want to go to London tomorrow.
script.translation_zh: 我明天想去伦敦。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: OK, let me check the train times.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我来查一下火车时间。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: There is a train at 9 AM.
script.translation_zh: 有一班火车是早上9点。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Great, I will take that one. Thanks!
script.translation_zh: 太好了，我就坐那班车。谢谢！

vocabulary.example: I buy a train ticket.
The train is fast.
Check the train times.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa! Do you want to shop today?
script.translation_zh: 嗨丽莎！你今天想去购物吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Sure, I need some new clothes.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我需要一些新衣服。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Great! Do you like shirts or dresses?
script.translation_zh: 好极了！你喜欢衬衫还是裙子？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: I like both, but I need a dress.
script.translation_zh: 我两种都喜欢，但我需要一件裙子。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: OK, let's find a nice blue dress.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我们找一件漂亮的蓝色裙子吧。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Thanks, I hope we find one soon.
script.translation_zh: 谢谢，希望我们能很快找到。

vocabulary.example: I like to shop on weekends.
She buys new clothes every month.
This dress is very beautiful.
The sky is blue today.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, what is your favorite food?
script.translation_zh: 嗨，丽莎，你最喜欢的食物是什么？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: I love pizza. It is very tasty.
script.translation_zh: 我喜欢披萨。它非常美味。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: I also like pizza. Do you make it?
script.translation_zh: 我也喜欢披萨。你会做吗？

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: No, I buy it from a shop.
script.translation_zh: 不，我从商店买。

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: OK, I sometimes make it at home.
script.translation_zh: 好的，我有时在家做。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Great! I want to try your pizza.
script.translation_zh: 太好了！我想尝尝你的披萨。

vocabulary.example: Pizza is my favorite food.
vocabulary.example_zh: 披萨是我最喜欢的食物。

vocabulary.example: This pizza is very tasty.
I buy food from the shop.

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Hi Lisa, I went to the doctor today.
script.translation_zh: 嗨，丽莎，我今天去看医生了。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Oh, really? Are you feeling OK now?
script.translation_zh: 哦，真的吗？你现在感觉好吗？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yes, I feel better after seeing the doctor.
script.translation_zh: 是的，看过医生后我感觉好多了。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: Great! Did you get any medicine?
script.translation_zh: 太好了！你拿药了吗？

script.speaker: Alex
script.text: Yes, I got some pills for my cough.
script.translation_zh: 是的，我拿了一些药丸治咳嗽。

script.speaker: Lisa
script.text: That's good news. Take care, Alex.
script.translation_zh: 这是个好消息。保重，亚历克斯。

vocabulary.example: She is a good doctor.
He takes medicine for his cold.
He has a bad cough.
